TSLA: Ford’s secret EV unit emerges from shadows, still bullish on new pickup amid market slowdown. Ford is continuing its push into electric vehicles with a new "Universal Electric Vehicle" (UEV) platform, despite a market slowdown and leadership changes. This platform is expected to help the automaker's Model e unit achieve profitability by 2029, with the first product being a midsize pickup truck priced around $30,000. Ford's strategy aims to compete with global EV leaders like Tesla and Chinese manufacturers by focusing on affordability and efficiency.

TSLA stock rises marginally premarket: Elon Musk’s FSD ambitions in Europe hang in balance ahead of EU regulatory hearing. This article reports that Tesla (TSLA) stock is experiencing a marginal rise in pre-market trading. The increase comes as Elon Musk's plans for Full Self-Driving (FSD) in Europe face uncertainty, pending an upcoming regulatory hearing with the European Union. The outcome of this hearing will be critical for Tesla's advanced driver-assistance system expansion in the European market.

REX TSLA Growth & Income ETF announces weekly distribution of $0.2997. REX TSLA Growth & Income ETF has declared a weekly distribution of $0.2997. This announcement provides current information regarding the fund's payout to its investors.

Tesla Loyalty Surges In US Survey As Brand Rebounds - Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA). A recent S&P Global Mobility survey for February shows a significant rebound in Tesla's US loyalty rates, reaching 61.1%, up from 54.7% the previous year. This places Tesla at the top of the list, a positive sign for the brand amidst prior reports of declining brand reputation. Investor Chamath Palihapitiya praised Tesla's driving experience, highlighting its FSD software, while some other automotive brands like Ford and Chevrolet saw their loyalty ratings fall.

TD (TD) launches autocallable notes linked to META, NVDA, TSLA — ≥6.90% coupon. The Toronto-Dominion Bank is offering autocallable contingent interest notes linked to the performance of Meta (META), NVIDIA (NVDA), and Tesla (TSLA). These notes feature a monthly contingent interest payment at an annual rate of at least 6.90%, provided each reference asset's closing value is at least 75.00% of its initial value. The notes can be automatically called if all reference assets reach 100.00% of their initial value on a monthly call observation date, returning the principal plus any accrued interest.

GraniteShares 2x Short TSLA Daily ETF (TSDD) Stock Forum and Discussion. The article provides a stock forum and discussion platform for the GraniteShares 2x Short TSLA Daily ETF (TSDD). It serves as a central hub for investors to share insights, analysis, and opinions regarding the performance and future outlook of TSDD.

Commercial Vehicle Electrification Market Size Accelerating. The Commercial Vehicle Electrification Market is experiencing significant growth, projected to reach $410.2 Billion by 2033 with an 18.2% CAGR, driven by geopolitical tensions, volatile diesel prices, government policies, and technological advancements. Key players include Tesla, BYD, and Volvo Group, while AI plays a crucial role in optimizing fleet operations and battery management. The market offers compelling investment opportunities across various segments and regions, with Asia-Pacific leading in adoption.

Italy new car registrations up 11.6% in April, minister says. New car registrations in Italy increased by 11.6% year-on-year in April, reaching 155,210 vehicles, according to transport ministry data. For the first four months of 2026, registrations were up 9.8% to 640,083 units. Stellantis, the market leader, saw its April sales rise by 14.4%, while Chinese brands like BYD and Chery experienced significant growth; Tesla's sales, however, declined.
TGT: TXT Stock Price Prediction 2025-2026 | Textron Inc Forecast | 24/7 Wall St.. 24/7 Wall St. has issued a "BUY" rating for Textron Inc (TXT) with a 12-month target price of $108.50, suggesting an 18.41% upside from its current price of $91.63. The forecast includes optimistic and conservative scenarios, as well as a 5-year projection to 2031 with a target of $155.14. Analyst sentiment from Wall Street is primarily "Buy" or "Hold," with no "Sell" ratings, highlighting a favorable outlook for the stock.

Mama’s Creations Redefines the Modern Deli Experience with Major National Retail Expansion. Mama’s Creations, a leading provider of fresh deli-prepared foods, has announced a significant retail expansion, rolling out its products to 2,000 Walmart and 750 Target locations nationwide. This move aims to meet consumer demand for convenient, quality meal solutions and assist retailers facing labor shortages. The expansion includes a diverse range of high-protein main dishes under the Mama’s Creations and Mama Mancini’s brands, supported by a comprehensive marketing program.
SBUX: Starbucks launches $1.1 billion tender offer for senior notes. Starbucks Corporation announced a tender offer to repurchase up to $1.1 billion of its senior notes across two pools, aiming to manage its $24.4 billion debt load. The offer includes various due dates and interest rates, with differing consideration eligibility based on early versus late tender submissions. This move follows strong fiscal second-quarter 2026 results and several analyst price target increases for SBUX.

Starbucks moves to buy back up to $1.1B of debt, with May 15 deadline. Starbucks Corporation announced the commencement of cash tender offers to repurchase up to $1.1 billion of eight series of senior notes, divided into two pools with different maximum amounts. The offers include an early tender payment incentive for holders who tender their notes by May 15, 2026, with the overall tender offers expiring on June 2, 2026. This debt repurchase aims to optimize the company's financial structure, and Starbucks has engaged several financial institutions as dealer managers and a tender and information agent for the transactions.

6 Consumer Discretionary Stocks With Whale Alerts In Today's Session. This article identifies six consumer discretionary stocks that showed "whale alerts" in today's trading session, indicating significant options activity. These alerts track transactions made by entities with large sums of money, which can signal potential trading opportunities for others. The article details specific put and call option trades for companies like Cava Group, Home Depot, and Starbucks, including their expiration dates, strike prices, and the sentiment (bearish or neutral) associated with each trade.

Jim Cramer Big, Explosive Prediction About Starbucks (SBUX). Jim Cramer predicted that Starbucks (SBUX) could be a "multi-year rocket ship" following the company's strong second-quarter earnings report. Starbucks saw its shares rise by 8.5% on April 29th after reporting $6.9 billion in net revenue and raising its fiscal year 2026 earnings per share forecast. This positive outlook from Cramer came after he had consistently defended the company and its CEO throughout 2025.

Is Starbucks Stock a Buy After Its 2026 Turnaround Report?. Starbucks reported a strong Q2 fiscal 2026 with record net revenue of $9.53 billion, up 9%, and global comparable sales increasing 6.2%. The company's "Back to Starbucks" program is driving top-line growth, with North America showing significant transaction increases. While the stock has outperformed the market and guidance was raised, its low-to-mid 30s P/E valuation implies a reliance on sustained execution and future margin expansion.
DIS: Alliance Wealth Advisors LLC UT Decreases Holdings in The Walt Disney Company $DIS. Alliance Wealth Advisors LLC UT reduced its stake in The Walt Disney Company by 24.3% in Q4 2025, selling 5,301 shares and ending the quarter with 16,530 shares valued at approximately $1.88 million. Disney's stock, currently trading around $101.29 with a market cap of $179.4 billion, recently beat quarterly earnings estimates with $1.63 EPS on $25.98 billion revenue. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus target price of $133.53 for the entertainment giant.

Star Wars Day (May The 4th) Is Here, But The Real Test For Disney Stock Comes In Three Weeks. Star Wars Day on May 4th highlights the upcoming release of "The Mandalorian & Grogu" on May 22nd, Disney's first theatrical Star Wars movie since 2019. This film, along with other major releases like "Toy Story 5," "Moana," and "Avengers: Doomsday," is expected to significantly boost Disney's box office performance in 2026. While Disney may not have the single highest-grossing film, these releases are anticipated to help the company dominate the overall box office chart.
NKE: Nike, Inc. Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend on Class A and Class B Common Stock, Payable on July 1, 2026. Nike, Inc. has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.41 per share for its Class A and Class B Common Stock. The dividend is payable on July 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 1, 2026. This announcement was made following a declaration by the company's Board of Directors.
